prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升，2026 年约第 137 名，在同类院校中处于中游偏上；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆管理类事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 104，评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐；安徽省 2026 年考生总数约 45.1 万，按近年比例估算物理类约 31.3 万，较 2025 年（32.08 万）略有减少；宁夏大学位于西北地区，对安徽考生属跨省就读，地域偏好一般；该校在安徽招生占比约 1.5%–2%，属常规外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅波动、2026 年计划扩招约 14.9% 及本省物理类考生略减；预测最低位次约 58996 名，区间 58496–59496 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 30826→33841→62835→44886→54203, with drastic fluctuations; in 2023, there was a significant drop to 62835, rebounding to 44886 in 2024, and then moving back to 54203 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 21,000 places over the past 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 54203; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui was 59 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 90 in 2024, and 94 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 108, an increase of about 14.9% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, reaching approximately 137th in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle range among similar institutions; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 104, rated as average, with low short video exposure and stable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity and are strongly recommended; the total number of candidates in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated 313,000 in Physics Category based on recent proportions, slightly decreasing from 2025 (320,800); Ningxia University is located in the northwest region, which is an out-of-province study for Anhui candidates, with average regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 1.5%–2%, which is a typical out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 14.9% in 2026, and the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in the province; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 58996, with a range of 58496–59496.
